data.body: AC amendment: Task 7 must specify the exact JSON format for the story list passed to sprint-manual-drain.sh. The format MUST match Task 6's expected input interface: [{"id":"<story-id>","title":"<story-title>","instructions":"<done-definition text>","verification_command":"<command or null>","deps":["<story-id>,..."]}]. Add acceptance criterion: 'JSON file written by sprint/SKILL.md for sprint-manual-drain.sh matches the schema defined in Task 6 sprint-manual-drain.sh implementation notes. Verify: python3 -c "import json; f=open(\'<json-file>\'); d=json.load(f); assert all(k in d[0] for k in [\"id\",\"title\",\"instructions\",\"verification_command\",\"deps\"])"'
